name: Normal POP
description: The Normal POP lets you create “normal vectors” and “tangent vectors” based on the incoming set of triangles or quads. You can create normals or tangents as point attributes, vertex attributes or primitive attributes. You can choose from several strategies for computing normals and tangents, based on each point being a member of several primitives. You usually use the P position attribute to compute the normals and tangents, but you can use any vec3 attribute. The results are placed in the N and (optionally) T attributes, but you can name the new attribute anything. If the incoming geometry already has normal or tangent vectors, you can choose to do nothing, re-compute values, error, or delete the attributes. Because this runs on the GPU that needs pre-determined sizes, you need to set the Max Number of Primitives per Point, the default 6 being typically sufficient.

parameters.name: Normals Action
parameters.label: Normals Action
parameters.description: Choose what to do regarding normals.

parameters.name: Input Position Attribute
parameters.label: Input Position Attribute
parameters.description: Input Position attribute used to calculate normals.

parameters.name: Attribute Class
parameters.label: Attribute Class
parameters.description: Makes the POP operate on point attributes, vertex attributes or primitive attributes where applicable.

parameters.name: Normals Weighting
parameters.label: Normals Weighting
parameters.description: For point normals, choose how to weight the normals of the primitives the point is a part of.

parameters.name: Compute Normals Technique
parameters.label: Compute Normals Technique
parameters.description: Specify which technique to use to calculate point normals.

parameters.name: Max Number of Primitives per Point
parameters.label: Max Number of Primitives per Point
parameters.description: Used to allocate temporary storage with the "Loop over Primitives Per Point" method, it should be set to the maximum number of primitives a point can be a part of in the input geometry.

parameters.name: Angle
parameters.label: Angle
parameters.description: For vertex normals, the threshold angle between faces above which the shared edge vertices don't share normals.

parameters.name: Normal Output Attribute Scope
parameters.label: Normal Output Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Output attribute scope for the normal.

parameters.name: Input Position Attribute
parameters.label: Input Position Attribute
parameters.description: Input Position attribute used to calculate tangents.

parameters.name: Input Normal Attribute
parameters.label: Input Normal Attribute
parameters.description: Input normal attribute used to calculate tangents.

parameters.name: Input Texture Coord Attribute
parameters.label: Input Texture Coord Attribute
parameters.description: Input texture coordinate attribute used to calculate tangents.

parameters.name: Compute Tangents Technique
parameters.label: Compute Tangents Technique
parameters.description: Specify which technique to use to calculate tangents.

parameters.name: Tangent Output Attribute Scope
parameters.label: Tangent Output Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Output attribute scope for the tangent.
